set.body: benchmark-regression.R runs 15 ops but baseline.csv tracks only 6. Add baseline rows for: chol, solve_rhs, eigen_sym, svd, sinkhorn, spmv, spmm, block_lanczos, svd_factor_subspace. Requires P0 (amatrix-366) to land first because the current baseline-join is broken. Acceptance: running benchmark-regression.sh with no regressions shows 15 ops x sizes x backends x variants all joining and passing.
set.title: Baseline 9 currently-untracked ops in baseline.csv
